summary: Idea `idea-955ff951` created and promoted to the active research head.
reason: Global widened results regress to near chance, but per-chunk delta signal remains partially alive, so a structured local-burst reformulation is more justified than either stopping or claiming success.

details.title: Chunk-Aware Local-Burst Packet Interface
details.problem: The widened 16-frame flat retrieval surface collapses to near chance even though some 4-frame chunks still preserve delta-first signal.
details.hypothesis: Preserving burst grouping and local position in the downstream packet interface will retain the surviving local signal better than flat clip-level retrieval.
details.mechanism: Represent each frozen 4-frame chunk as a first-class packet group and evaluate chunk-aware matching before clip-level aggregation.
details.method_brief: Keep the same frozen chunked export, but replace flat global matching with a chunk-aware bundle and consumer.
details.expected_gain: Turns the current mixed widened result into a more defensible interface question instead of forcing an unsupported flat retrieval claim.
details.next_target: implement a chunk-aware bundle/evaluator with explicit burst grouping and local frame order.
risks: The remaining signal may be too burst-specific.
Chunk-aware packaging may improve interpretation without improving usefulness.

guidance_vm.summary: Idea branch is ready. Continue with the next active optimization stage on this durable research node.
guidance_vm.why_now: The accepted idea already has its durable branch/worktree, so the next leverage point is the configured next stage rather than another route-selection loop.
complete_when: The next configured stage starts from this branch.
The resulting evidence or decision is written durably.

alternative_routes.label: Inspect the branch once
alternative_routes.when: A quick branch sanity check is still needed before running.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Adds caution, but should stay short.

alternative_routes.label: Analyze first
alternative_routes.when: The idea package still has unresolved setup ambiguity that needs clarification.
alternative_routes.tradeoff: Can reduce wasted runs, but is unusual before a first main result.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.record_main_experiment(...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Record the first real main result on this branch when the next stage is experiment-oriented.
